title: CAMRIP
wikitext:
[]: CAMRIP Post by Alfa&Omega » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:12 pm Where is it ? for the love of all the fans someone go and screening the movie please! Ok srsly, there is anything yet?

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:15 pm First film took 5 months to leak. And Japan is strict on illegal cam recordings, serious jail time involved. You're just have to suffer like the rest of us....oh how I suffer. I can go see horrid Transformers 2 anytime I want but I can't even get a real clip of 2.0.... I'm in a glass box of emotion here

[]: Post by Alfa&Omega » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:18 pm FIVE MONTHS? ARE YOU KIDDIN ME DUDE? what im supose to with the massive spoiler's attack? =(

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:27 pm You can always sell everything you own, burn down all the bridges and head to Japan. Or you can fantasize about the film while gently weeping, like most of us. There will be a screening in Bonn, Germany in a month or so, though, so maybe someone will be able to make a camrip there. Maybe security will be more lax there than in Japanes theaters. 


[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:31 pm Do you know what's the most frustrating thing about the Bonn showing? For the past two summers I've been able to secure work overseas in Germany and was paid quite well. This summer when asked to come back I declined saying I wanted to work on building myself up as an independent film artist here in the states. Lo and behold, THIS HAPPENS. With English subtitles no less! And Terry Gilliam's "The Imaginarium of Dr. Parnassus" plays in Munich!? God must hate me or something.... And to add the final juicy layer of agony on my Pity Party Cake...the summer hasn't exactly gone according to plan. In fact it's Le Sucked. Back into my glass box of emotion.

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:35 pm Well you can always cheer yourself up with Alien and other great remakes:P.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:37 pm unless we get super lucky with Bonn, we'll have wait and see if it plays in some place like Greater China, Korea or some place where piracy isn't such a concern for the theater owners or the authorities (hated to stereotype there, but the facts are the facts)

[]: Post by OKdesuKA » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:38 pm I'm pretty sure this place is going to implode the day the camrip drops.

[]: Post by Alfa&Omega » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:39 pm ok thnks to all for recomendations dear moderators you can (not) close the topic.

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:39 pm Is anyone from this forum that is going? I would kill to for a chance to go there.

[]: Post by Jinroh » Mon Jun 29, 2009 1:59 pm What's the date of its screening in Germany already? I forgot to book tickets. Never too late with those cheap easyjet prices.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 29, 2009 1:59 pm This has run its course. Patience is golden.
